prestazioni: Replace the stock 1,991cc SC (Standard Competition) inline-4 engine with a fully balanced and blueprinted version of the Triumph SC engine (engine code: 20S), featuring forged Mahle pistons (83mm bore, 92mm stroke), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Bryant Racing. Pair this with a custom camshaft profile from Kent Cams (280° duration, 0.450" lift) and a Weber 45 DCOE carburetor setup with velocity stacks and a custom intake manifold by TWM Induction.

Install a custom-built 1.5-bar Garrett T25 turbocharger system with an air-to-water intercooler (custom fabricated by Bell Intercoolers) and a custom exhaust manifold featuring 4-2-1 merge collectors (stainless steel, 1.75" primary tubes) leading to a 2.5" stainless steel exhaust with a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler for optimized scavenging and backpressure management.

Upgrade the drivetrain with a Quaife ATB differential (80% lockup) in a custom aluminum bellhousing, paired with a close-ratio 5-speed gearbox from a Triumph TR4A (gear ratios: 1st 2.99:1, 2nd 2.10:1, 3rd 1.37:1, 4th 1.00:1, 5th 0.82:1) and a Tilton Super Starter for reliable high-RPM engagement. Suspension is overhauled with poly-bushed front A-arms, a custom-fabricated rear trailing arm setup with rose-jointed Heim ends, and a set of Öhlins DFV road & track coilovers (adjustable damping, 200lb/in front springs, 150lb/in rear springs).
estetica: Replace the stock steel body with a hand-formed aluminum widebody kit from RML Group, featuring flared fenders (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear), a custom front splitter with integrated brake ducts, and a carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts. The hood is replaced with a custom carbon fiber unit featuring a functional NACA duct for intercooler airflow.

Install a custom roll cage designed by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, 8-point with door bars) and pair it with a set of Recaro SRD racing seats (carbon fiber shell, 6-point harnesses by Schroth) and a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, quick-release hub). The interior is stripped of all non-essential trim, with aluminum panels replacing the stock dash and a custom digital gauge cluster from AIM MXS Strada (displaying boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR).

Apply a custom livery inspired by the 1958 Le Mans TR3A works cars, featuring a two-tone paint scheme (British Racing Green with Signal Red accents) by RS Coachworks, gold-pinstriped by hand. The wheels are custom 15x8 ET15 front and 15x9 ET5 rear magnesium Minilite replicas (by Image Wheels) wrapped in Avon CR6ZZ tires (195/50R15 front, 225/50R15 rear). Additional details include a custom aluminum fuel filler cap (engraved with the Triumph logo) and a set of Hella Rallye 3000 headlights with Cibie Oscar driving lamps.
